headline: Plug Power’s Hydrogen Bet Is Starting To Look Real Again
summary: Plug Power (NASDAQ: PLUG) stock has staged a surprising comeback in 2026. After once trading above $1,500 and falling below $1 in 2025, PLUG is now up more than 70% year to date, trading around $3.78 as of mid-May.

headline: Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) Screens as a Strong Dividend Growth Stock with Sustainable Payouts
summary: Cummins (CMI) offers a strong dividend profile with sustainable payouts, a 7/10 dividend rating, solid profitability, and 16% EPS growth—ideal for investors seeking quality income.

headline: AI rally rolls on as Nvidia hype outweighs inflation and rate fears
summary: Dan Ives, Global Head of Technology Research at Wedbush Securities, and Vance Howard, CEO of Howard Capital Management, say AI demand and Nvidia momentum continue supporting markets despite rate and inflation fears.
